name_en: M41937 Red! Made of top-grain cowhide! The Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth flap secured by a engraved button. It includes an inner slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back pocket.
name_cn:
M41937 Red! Made of top-grain cowhide! The Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth flap secured by a engraved button. It includes an inner slip pocket, a zip coin pocket, card slots, and a back pocket.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm.
